name: 概率
subject: math
domain_name: 统计 / Statistics & Probability / Statistics & Probability
curriculum_points:
• 9Sp.01 Understand that the probability of multiple mutually exclusive events can be found by summation
and all mutually exclusive events have a total probability of 1.
• 9Sp.02 Identify when successive and combined events are independent and when they are not.
• 9Sp.03 Understand how to find the theoretical probabilities of combined events.

interactive_resources.description: Desmos 二项分布概率交互
GeoGebra 数学可视化：参数调节探索函数图像

errors.description: 只记年代与名词，不能用史料与制度变迁解释历史进程。
把传说叙述与考古/文献证据混为一谈，未区分证据强度。

exercises.stem: 结合课标要求，说明「概率」的核心内涵，并各举一条史料或史实依据。
exercises.answer:
应答扣课标要点：• 9Sp.01 Understand that the probability of multiple mutually exclusive events can be found by summation
and all mutuall…；并区分证据类型（文献/考古/制度等）。

exercises.stem: 用因果链解释：• 9Sp.02 Identify when successive and combined events are independent and when t… 对理解「概率」为何重要？
exercises.answer: 需写出前因—制度/经济/思想变化—后果，避免只罗列年代。
